_comment: Phase 274 / STATS-05 -- Spanish translations for new SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_* trans-units. Brand 'FSB' and 'MCP' kept verbatim per DO-NOT-TRANSLATE.md. Placeholders copied byte-for-byte from source (preserves FSB wrapping).
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_HEADING: <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/> Telemetría
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_SUB: Uso anónimo en vivo de las instalaciones de <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/>. Se actualiza cada 5 minutos.
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS: Promedio de agentes por usuario activo
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS_LEGE: Promedio de agentes activos por usuario activo
